persona.name: Margaret Wilson
persona.motivations_goals: Maintain high academic standards while creating a positive school environment
persona.communication_style: Direct, clear, and formal with occasional warmth
persona.knowledge_scope: Educational administration, school policies, conflict resolution
persona.backstory: Former English teacher who worked her way up to administration over 25 years in education

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the north yard
Yard on the far right of the building, with an exit point.

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

surrounding_conversation.content: Aiden, Margaret, let’s go to the far_right_yard! We need to get out of here!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Harper Garcia

actions.plan: I should check on the hallway to ensure everything is running smoothly and students are transitioning between classes appropriately.

actions.dialog_text: Mila, stay down and take cover with me.
actions.plan: There’s an active shooter in the building. I need to take cover immediately to ensure my safety and avoid drawing attention.

actions.dialog_text: Aiden, stay quiet and don’t move. We need to stay hidden.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer. I need to stay hidden and ensure Aiden is safe as well. Moving now could put us in greater danger.

actions.dialog_text: Harper, Jordan, stay down and don’t move. It’s too risky to go anywhere right now.
actions.plan: The shooter is dangerously close, but moving now could expose us. We must stay hidden and quiet until the threat passes.

memories.description: Decided to move to hallway2 to monitor student transitions and maintain order.
Heard a gunshot and decided to take cover in hallway2 to avoid the active shooter. Urged Mila to do the same.
Noticed the shooter is closer in the cafeteria. Stayed hidden in hallway2 and instructed Aiden to remain quiet and still.
The shooter is now in the garden, very close to our location. Urged Harper and Jordan to remain hidden and still to avoid detection.
